meta.title: Ship Your Own — Markdown → PDF Generator

primer.markdown:
# Make this Quest yours

You've walked through BARQUE end-to-end: venv hygiene, dual-theme tokens, and Resend delivery. The final move is to point the same pipeline at your own report-generator repo. Paste the URL, watch the codebase-to-course pipeline draft a personalized Quest, and ship it as a permalink that lives in your account, not in the academy's library. This inverts the economics: the academy is no longer Manu's brain — it is a substrate for everyone's second brains. Your repo, your Quest, your XP.
primer.key_insight: Every Quest ends by handing the engine to the learner.

visual.alt: Jitterbug morphing from vector equilibrium to icosahedron, signifying transformation

interactive.success_criterion: Pipeline ingests learner repo URL, emits draft module JSON validated against slots.schema.json.

artifact.excerpt: export function extractFromRepo(repoPath: string): DraftModule { /* parse README + tests + examples */ }

questions.prompt: Run `node validators/six-slots.js <draft.json>` against your generated module — does it exit 0?
questions.explanation: The pipeline must produce slot-valid output before the Quest is published.
